bargaining_status: CWA Local 1036 (likely; IFPTE Local 195 possible) — NJ State Executive Branch CBA 2023-2027
administering_agency: NJ Department of Labor and Workforce Development, Division of Disability Determination Services

cba_terms.notes: Union reported as strongest compensation package in 15+ years; Step 10 pay cap eliminated for IFPTE Local 195 members (if applicable)

Claims Adjudicator.salary_range: TBD — estimated $53,560 (min) to $68,777 (max) based on Glassdoor aggregated data; exact Range/Step requires CWA or CSC tables
Claims Adjudicator.notes: Glassdoor figures reflect civilian state employee aggregate; official CWA/IFPTE scheduled rates not extracted. Confirm exact Range classification with NJDOL HR.

Senior Claims Adjudicator.description: Reviews medical and vocational evidence for complex/appeal cases; supervises adjudicators and medical consultants
Senior Claims Adjudicator.salary_range: TBD — estimated $67,000–$86,800 (90th percentile up to $93,909) based on ZipRecruiter aggregated data; exact Range/Step requires CWA or CSC tables
Senior Claims Adjudicator.notes: Senior position; exact pay premium over Claims Adjudicator requires official NJ CSC Range assignment. CSC Job Spec #64947 confirms supervisory duties.

Claims Adjudicator Supervisor.class_code: TBD — may be same as Senior Claims Adjudicator or distinct title
Claims Adjudicator Supervisor.description: Direct supervisor to Claims Adjudicators per Job Spec #64947 context
Claims Adjudicator Supervisor.salary_range: TBD — likely aligned with Senior Claims Adjudicator range
Claims Adjudicator Supervisor.notes: Distinct supervisor classification may exist; confirm with NJDOL HR and NJ CSC job spec database.
